TextENGNew: "...And there you have it.@k@vS04/37/310300522. So head out there and knock this out of the park, Natsumi!"
Confused, I looked back and forth between Chisato-chan, standing proudly in front of me in an imposing stance, and the two colorful tickets sitting on my desk.
They seemed like movie tickets.
As soon as class ended, Chisato-san placed (slammed?) the tickets on my desk with a triumphant look on her face. Overwhelmed by her smile, I took one of them to be safe.
The date was this Sunday. The price was 2,500 yen, a little expensive. Apparently we had better seats than average.
I looked up, but Chisato-chan just smiled and said nothing. Reluctantly, I took the other one and verified that it had the same information. The only difference was the serial number.
"......Umm, Chisato-chan."
"What is it, oh best friend?"
"This theater is in that cinema complex they built this year, right?@k@vS04/36/310100861. I don't know what I'm doing here at all. Could you tell me what movie you want to see?"
"...Huh?@k@vS04/37/310300527. Why would you ask what movies I'd like to see?"
"Well, I mean,@k@vS04/36/310100863. ...you want us to go together, don't you?"
"You moooooron!!"
"Kyaaaahh?!"
She shouted right in my face, causing me to flinch backwards. ...By pure dumb luck, I managed to avoid falling out of my chair.
"W-what's gotten into you, Chisato-chan?!"
"Look here, Natsumi!@k@vS04/37/310300530. One pair of tickets for special seats at the movie theater? Shouldn't that bring something in particular to mind?"
"Something in particular,@k@vS04/36/310100867. ...like I said, going to a movie together."
"How sad would it be for two girls to have to share expensive special seats in a movie theater together!?"
"Hiyaaaah?!"

Faced with yet another shout, I hid behind my other best friend who was standing next to me. Tamako-chan, who'd been watching our interaction up close with exasperation, let out a deep sigh as she stood between Chisato-chan and me, then began to speak.
"Listen here, Chisato.@k@vS04/38/310400208. From what I'm seeing, even I can only imagine you're inviting her to a movie.@k@vS04/38/310400209. Not that I see a problem with that."
"What are you talking about?!@k@vS04/37/310300533. A movie is traditionally seen by a couple, a man and a woman!@k@vS04/37/310300534. What fun is there going with other girls?!"
"...I've never seen you go to a movie with a boy my entire life.@k@vS04/38/310400211. Also, didn't the two of us go to a movie together not that long ago?"
"That case was an exception."

"If that "exception" has happened often enough to number in the triple digits, it seems more like your idea of "normal" is the exception.@k@vS04/38/310400213. I don't know what sort of magazines you've been reading, but are you sure you're not just sleeping with your eyes open~?"
"What's that?!"
The usual sarcasm and rebuttals began to unfold. Normally, I'd just watch from the sidelines without doing anything... but this time the situation was a bit different.
"Come on, Natsumi!@k@vS04/37/310300538. Don't just stand there and watch like it doesn't concern you!@k@vS04/37/310300539. You're being given the divine key to victory here!"
She was making less sense by the minute. But then,
"Hey, Chisa.@k@vS04/39/310200053. Will you just give me back that dictionary alr..."
"Look, what I'm trying to say is,@k@vS04/37/310300541. use these to take that blockhead@k@vS04/37/310300542. out on a date already, for crying out loud!"
The moment I realized the meaning of those words, my face flushed... For better or worse, Akira-kun, who'd come to get his dictionary back, also froze when he heard it.
"...A-Akira-kun?!"
"Oh, Akira.@k@vS04/37/310300544. Great, this is good timing."
It seemed like bad timing to me, maybe even the worst. Chisato-chan gave me a sidelong glance as I stood there petrified, then she walked up to Akira-kun.
Akira-kun turned to leave the classroom, no doubt his warning instincts from many years of friendship with Chisato-chan kicking in, but she swiftly grabbed him by the collar before he could escape.
"Guh?!@k@vS04/39/310200056. ...Wh-what was that for, Chisa?!"
"Hey, what kind of man runs from a confrontation?@k@vS04/37/310300546. If you're going to be a boyfriend, you've gotta face it head on."
"Ch-Ch-Ch-Chisato-channn?!"
Those bold words snapped me out of my funk as I frantically stood up and rushed over to Chisato-chan. ...But it was already too late.
""Wh-whaaaaaaat~~!!""
The classroom, where more than half of my classmates still remained, turned into a melting pot of cheering and awe in an instant. The boys whistled while the girls surrounded me in a flash.
"Kimiyoshi-san, you've been going out with Toudou-kun?!"
"Uuuwaaaah~!@k@vS04/00/VT1B_StuFb1003. This is the first I've heard any of this!!"
"Umm, uhh,@k@vS04/36/310100874. ...it's not like that."
"Wow, you're so lucky!@k@vS04/00/VT1B_StuFa1006. I secretly had my sights on Toudou-kun myself~!"
"Who was the one who confessed?@k@vS04/00/VT1B_StuFb1005. Kimiyoshi-san?@k@vS04/00/VT1B_StuFb1006. Toudou-kun?"
"Aah... auauau~"
No matter how hard I wanted to deny it, my mind was in a panic, my throat was trembling, and I couldn't think of any words to say.
Plus, it wasn't just my face, my whole body was heating up as though it was blowing out steam. I felt like I was about to faint right there.
"A-Akira-ku..."
"Toudou, you sly dog!@k@vS04/00/VT1B_StuMa1005. You got the jump on us~!"
"I'm jealous, you bastard!@k@vS04/00/VT1B_StuMb1003. What was all that BS about not being interested in girls?!"
"Ouch?!@k@vS04/39/310200058. S-stop that. ...Guh?!@k@|@y@vS04/39/310200059. Y-you're strangling me!!"
On the other hand, Akira-kun was being jostled, poked, kicked, and put into a headlock by some of his friends.
He managed to escape their rather violent expression of congratulations, then glared angrily at Chisato-chan, standing there with her arms crossed and a big grin.
"Hey, come on Chisato!@k@vS04/39/310200061. How dare you!!"

"Oh come on, it's been days since you confessed to her, yet you haven't made a single move.@k@vS04/37/310300548. From what I've seen, you haven't gone out with her during lunch break or after school.@k@vS04/37/310300549. ...You redefine what it means to be a loser."
"Th... that's my choice to make!@k@vS04/39/310200063. Besides, I haven't received a reply from Kimiyoshi yet..."
"Oh ho!@k@vS04/37/310300551. Natsumi, you're welcome to, any time now."

"Well, I'd planned on just watching from the sidelines, but you're not gonna make any moves, are you? @k@vS04/37/310300553. There's nothing more pathetic than making up countless excuses to come by our class yet not acting on any of those opportunities."

Was... was that true? Come to think of it, I did notice he'd been giving and taking dictionaries and notebooks from Chisato-chan and Tamako-chan during breaks recently. ...But I didn't think anything of it.
"So I figured, since it didn't look like things were gonna go any farther on their own,@k@vS04/37/310300555. I decided to light the fuse myself.@k@vS04/37/310300556. Aren't you grateful, hmm?"
"...You say that, but don't you think you used a little too much gunpowder?"
Tamako gave her usual snarky retort, but I didn't agree. Chisato-chan set way too much. She'd taken this too far. This was crazy...
"...So there you have it, Akira!@k@vS04/37/310300558. Take this ticket and go with Natsumi on your first date!"
"Hey, you can't just decide that on your own!@k@vS04/39/310200066. Going to a movie? That's just..."
"Huh... Akira-kun?"
"No... That's..."
"Hmmm~?"
"I-I just wanted to be sure Kimiyoshi was ok with it..."
Ooooooooohhhhhhhhh~~~~!!

A grand cheer erupted. ...Before I knew it, there was even a crowd gathering outside the classroom. With things how they are, the whole school will know about this tomorrow... and I'll have to spend several days on a bed of nails...
"Ch-Chisato-chan...@k@vS04/36/310100879. What have you done...?!"
Unsure whether to be angry or sad, I raised both my fists as I objected to Chisato-chan, my face on the verge of tears.
But Chisato-chan just gave me a hearty laugh, then a strong pat on the shoulder with a huge grin on her face.
"You don't have to go to a movie, anything's fine.@k@vS04/37/310300561. You should go, Natsumi.@k@vS04/37/310300562. Deep down, you actually wanted to go out with Akira soon, didn't you?"

I pounded on Chisato-chan's chest... but deep down, I wasn't complaining. She wasn't wrong that Akira-kun and I have both been acting cautious around each other and haven't broached the topic once this whole time.
Then... perhaps this was really her way of showing me consideration. Thinking about it that way allowed me to at least somewhat forgive Chisato-chan's outrageous actions...
"So there you have it, everyone!@k@vS04/37/310300564. Let's give a big round of applause for their happy future and to celebrate the discovery of a lively topic to discuss for a while~~!!"
Whaaaaaaaa~~~~!! Clap clap clap clap clap~~~~!!
I take it back! No way I can forgive thiiiiiis!!
"Ch-Chisato-chan!!@k@vS04/36/310100884. Cut it out, I..."
I began to raise my voice in utmost anger, but then.

"Second year, class C, Natsumi Kimiyoshi-san.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_Scjimu1002. Second year, class C, Natsumi Kimiyoshi-san.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_Scjimu1003. Ogata-sensei is calling for you.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_Scjimu1004. Please report to the staff room.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_Scjimu1005. I repeat..."
"What's that...? They're asking for me?"
The school broadcast was calling my name. ...Ogata-sensei was calling me? What on earth could this be for...?
"...Natsumi?"
"Ah, I have to go for a little while.@k@vS04/36/310100887. See you later."
After dismissing Chisato-chan and Tamako-chan's dubious looks, I began to make my way out of the classroom.
...It was only later I learned my sudden departure caused the girls to start interrogating Akira-kun too, rather than just the boys.
"Hey, hey, Toudou-kun, how did you confess to her?"
"Perhaps a late night love talk over the phone?"
"Are the two of you traveling somewhere together for summer vacation~?"
"Somebody, help meeee~~!!"
After finally securing a quiet place by the drinking fountain, Akira breathed a sigh of relief. ...He'd been pushed and kicked around until a moment ago, and the joints in his body were aching.
"That was... absolutely terrible."
It was unclear if the boys and girls were really celebrating. Their congratulations were so rough and unforgiving that it made him wonder if they were actually jealous.
...In all honesty though, he knew they were probably just looking for a distraction from their boring school lives, but that didn't make being on the receiving end any easier.
"...I better not head back to the classroom for a while."
He left his bag behind, but it was too late to do anything about that. He began heading in the direction of the art room... but a thought suddenly came to mind after he took the first step.

...His classmates in the art club were fond of rumors. They were likely already up in arms about this latest revelation, so going to the art room at this point in time was essentially a death sentence.
"Haah,@k@vS04/39/310200075. ...Damn you, Chisa..."
"...You called~?"
"Whoa?!"

A voice suddenly cried out from behind, causing Akira to jump in surprise. When he looked back, Chisato was standing there with a grin and an amused look on her face, accompanied by a bitterly smiling Tamako.
"Oh my, it was so exciting earlier, wasn't it?@k@vS04/37/310300568. It's been a long time since I had so much fun at school!@k@vS04/37/310300569. Ahhahhahhah~!!"
"...Look here."
"Ah-ahahaha... Akira-chan, that was tough, huh?"
Akira glanced at her with a hint of genuine anger. As he wasn't fond of crowds, it had been no laughing matter. It was a rather annoying experience.
"Sorry, sorry, I got a little carried away.@k@vS04/37/310300571. I didn't think it'd become such a big deal. I did something terrible to Natsumi."
"What about me?@k@vS04/39/310200079. And it wasn't a little carried away. Your scale is way off."
"Well... honestly, I got swept away by the "Oh my god" sentiment in the crowd."

"But Akira, you're used to being mobbed by everyone, aren't you?@k@vS04/37/310300573. You got a much bigger reaction when you were chosen by the art department last year.@k@vS04/37/310300574. So this level of excitement is fine."
"That's not for you to decide.@k@vS04/39/310200081. ...Geez."
"A-Akira-chan..."
Akira was upset and in no mood to play along with Chisato's jokes, so he spit those words out to end the conversation. Intending to leave, he slipped between the two of them and turned his back.
"......Natsumi has been acting strange recently."
He almost didn't hear it.

Chisato's voice was low, a far cry from the cheerful tone she had up until a moment ago. Akira suddenly stopped and turned around... Chisato was standing with her back turned and her shoulders slumped. Tamako also had a forlorn expression on her face.
"Your class... has also heard, haven't they?@k@vS04/37/310300577. About the incident at my family's care and welfare center."
"...Yeah."
With a pain in his chest, Akira nodded.
...People even in his class had been talking about the murder at the Saeki Care and Welfare Center.
However, most of the students were keeping mum out of consideration for the well-liked Chisato and warnings from their homeroom teachers not to make a commotion out of it.

"I'm fine.@k@vS04/37/310300579. It didn't hurt me personally, and while the care and welfare center may be in disorder, they're managing to put the pieces together again.@k@vS04/37/310300580. But, Natsumi was..."
"...Did something happen with Kimiyoshi?"
Chisato faced Tamako and faintly nodded. Then she turned around with a serious expression and asked.
"Akira, be honest with me.@k@vS04/37/310300583. Did you know... about Natsumi's part-time job?"

Akira gasped from the sudden question. Still, to honor his promise to Natsumi, he tried to tell Chisato that he didn't know... but then he remembered where Natsumi worked and said "Yeah" while nodding.
"I ran into Kimiyoshi exiting from the service entrance once while heading home after a sketch.@k@vS04/39/310200087. ...She told me herself that she was working part-time."
"Did you,@k@vS04/37/310300585. ...tell anyone?"
"Of course not.@k@vS04/39/310200089. Kimiyoshi asked me to keep it a secret."
"...Yeah."
After hearing that, Chisato let out a discouraged sigh. Finding her reaction strange, Akira gave her a puzzled look, but then,
At last, an idea struck him.

...If her part-time job was at the care and welfare center, there was a high probability that she was involved with the people in the incident. Or worse, she could have had the misfortune of being a witness at the scene of the incident...!
"Don't tell that Kimiyoshi was there at the time of the incident...?!"
"...Exactly.@k@vS04/37/310300588. She happened to have businesss there that day, only to arrive right after it happened,@k@vS04/37/310300589. ...and to make matters worse...!"
The director of Natsumi's workplace was murdered... and the killer was an elderly man living at the center, who was a friend of Natsumi's.
And worse, Natsumi saw the victim's body up close while it was being carried away. She all but lost control from the shock of it all...
"The police questioned her right after, too.@k@vS04/37/310300591. Thanks to that, Natsumi developed a fever that night..."
"That all happened...@k@vS04/39/310200094. I didn't know anything about it...!"
"...I figured as much.@k@vS04/38/310400219. You wouldn't have left Natsumi alone if you did."
"...Don't make fun of me, Tama."
"I didn't mean it like that.@k@vS04/38/310400221. ...Quite the opposite, in fact.@k@vS04/38/310400222. What will you do, Chisato?"
Even though she was facing Tamako, Chisato didn't say anything and just held her head. Unable to understand the situation, Akira continued asking.
"What on earth is going on with Kimiyoshi?@k@vS04/39/310200097. Whatever you're hiding, please tell me!"
"Hey, Chisato! Tama!"
"......You won't regret it?"
That was unexpected.
Pulling down the hand covering her face, Chisato looked at Akira.
"You won't regret it?"
...How long had it been since Akira saw a look like this on Chisato's face?
He thought it was a joke.
At first, he felt exasperated, figuring it was just another one of her over the top threats that meant nothing.
But, Chisato wasn't laughing. ...Neither was Tamako.
That spoke clear volumes of just how serious the coming conversation was going to be.
Silence hung over the three of them, each with different expressions and sentiments.
A cold sweat ran down Akira's cheek and dripped from his chin.
The only sound that could be heard was... the cry of the higurashi in the evening.
Eventually, after some hesitation... Akira slowly and somewhat awkwardly nodded at Chisato.
"......Tamako and I were kind of expecting, you know.@k@vS04/37/310300597. That you were the one who did something terrible."
Akira's eyes widened from the unexpected words. But Chisato maintained her solemn expression and continued.
"Tamako and I have kept Natsumi's part-time job a secret the whole time.@k@vS04/37/310300599. Since it's a violation of school rules, she could have gotten suspended."

"Of course, we were going to do everything in our power to cover for her if necessary,@k@vS04/37/310300601. but Tamako and I decided it would be best if Natsumi's secret stayed between the three of us."
But now... a murder occurred at Natsumi's part-time job.
So if everyone found out about Natsumi's part-time job, her gossip-hungry classmates would ask her all sorts of rude and insensitive questions, hoping to hear more about the incident.
If that happened, her mental stability might deteriorate even further.
That was why even Chisato and Tamako, her closest friends, didn't want to broach the subject for a long time.
...Yet recently, Tamako happened to overhear people in her class talking about how Natsumi worked at the scene of the crime.

"And so... the only reason I could think that they knew about Natsumi's job...@k@vS04/37/310300603. was that you spilled the beans to someone.@k@vS04/37/310300604. But after everything I've heard... that seems impossible."
"Of course it is.@k@vS04/39/310200103. Why would I break my promise to Kimiyoshi?"

"I understand that.@k@vS04/37/310300606. We're childhood friends, so I know you're not that kind of guy.@k@vS04/37/310300607. Tamako feels the same way.@k@vS04/37/310300608. ...But if that's the case, then we have to consider the worst-case scenario."
Akira's eyes widened in astonishment. ...That was truly the worst possibility.
"......Right. Natsumi is the one who said something.@k@vS04/37/310300610. She told someone in the class about this incident.@k@vS04/37/310300611. ...Actually, we already have proof."
He was stunned. Even though this deduction could be reached by process of elimination, he couldn't believe such a bizarre answer. Or rather, he didn't want to believe it.
"B-but isn't that weird?@k@vS04/39/310200108. This isn't the kind of thing Kimiyoshi would want to remember, is it?@k@vS04/39/310200109. So why...?"

"We've been asking ourselves that question this whole time.@k@vS04/37/310300613. There can't be anything Natsumi would gain from talking about it.@k@vS04/37/310300614. That's why Natsumi wouldn't have talked about it,@k@vS04/37/310300615. ...or at least, that's what we thought. But..."
"But what?"

"In the first place, it's strange.@k@vS04/37/310300617. ...During lunch break, I got an opportunity to talk to the person who claims they heard about it from Natsumi.@k@vS04/37/310300618. Apparently... Natsumi had some rather harsh words about that culprit from Hinamizawa."
"...Huh?@k@vS04/36/310100889. What kind of person is the culprit?"

"Anyone could tell he was strange.@k@vS04/36/310100891. Maybe it'd be more apt to say he was a suspicious person?@k@vS04/36/310100892. Seriously, people from Hinamizawa are the worst, aren't they?@k@vS04/36/310100893. Getting mixed up with him was just awful~."
Akira was stunned speechless. Natsumi, of all people, speaking ill of others without any remorse? He couldn't imagine seeing her with malice and contempt on her face.

"Well, I think so too. And I told them the same.@k@vS04/37/310300620. I've never seen her talk bad about anyone before. Especially not someone she got along with until recently at that.@k@vS04/37/310300621. ...So I could hardly believe what I heard..."
"Is it... really true?"
"...I don't believe it yet.@k@vS04/37/310300623. That student doesn't seem to like Natsumi very much, so I think it was a baseless lie.@k@vS04/37/310300624. ...That's what I want to believe, anyway."

"However, Natsumi's been acting strange ever since that day.@k@vS04/37/310300626. I intended to keep her distracted by not bringing up the incident,@k@vS04/37/310300627. ...but it actually seems like it doesn't bother her at all.@k@vS04/37/310300628. We laugh and chat... Natsumi is acting like she always does."
"...Isn't that a good thing?"
He remembered back when their relationship was revealed. ...Natsumi got shy because she was being teased by the other girls, and she was angry with Chisato.
So as far as Akira could see, Natsumi seemed to be doing fine... Thinking about that, he felt a little relieved.
But neither Chisato nor Tamako agreed with that assessment.

"Akira-chan, you may think that because you don't know Natsumi very well.@k@vS04/38/310400226. But we hang out with her and talk to her every hour, every day... so we know.@k@vS04/38/310400227. She's the kind who gets depressed when something really bad happens."

"When she's feeling down, you can see it in her face or attitude, even though she insists she's fine.@k@vS04/38/310400229. ...But I've been keeping a close eye on her the past few days,@k@vS04/38/310400230. ...yet she isn't showing any of that."
"So, what does that mean...?"

"What I mean is... it's like she's not Natsumi.@k@vS04/38/310400232. It feels abnormal. I don't know how to put it...@k@vS04/38/310400233. ...It's like she's a different person, or has been possessed by something..."
Akira was about to dismiss her concerns as nonsense, but the serious look on Tamako's face shut him right up.
...Tamako was always a realist. She never believed in ghosts or invisible beings. So for her of all people to use the word abnormal demonstrated just how seriously she meant it.
"And what's more... even your class has heard about it, right, Akira?@k@vS04/37/310300630. The Hinamizawa... incident."
"Y-Yeah..."

It was a ridiculous story. Rumors straight out of a horror movie were being shared even in Akira's class. Things like natives of Hinamizawa acting abnormal and attacking others or killing themselves as a result of Oyashiro-sama's curse.
However, he had no interest in that and ignored it, figuring it was just idle gossip that'd soon be forgotten...
"But what about it?@k@vS04/39/310200119. That story has no relation to Kimiyoshi, right?"
"......What if Natsumi was from Hinamizawa?"

"You know it too, don't you Akira?@k@vS04/37/310300633. The town where she lived before is called Okinomiya.@k@vS04/37/310300634. And I recently learned@k@vS04/37/310300635. that the town right next to Hinamizawa village... has the same name."

"Also, I happened to spot something in the newspaper.@k@vS04/38/310400235. ..."Kimiyoshi" is also the last name of the mayor of Hinamizawa village.@k@vS04/38/310400236. It's not a very common name... so I thought it was possible."
Akira suddenly gasped. ...He understood what Chisato and Tamako were trying to say.
"Maybe... Natsumi's from Hinamizawa.@k@vS04/37/310300637. So when people start talking about a curse or being possessed, I can't even laugh about it as a joke."
"That's ridiculous..."

"Believe me, I agree.@k@vS04/37/310300639. But even if it isn't... maybe the reason Natsumi is saying bad things about Hinamizawa...@k@vS04/37/310300640. is to highlight that she's different from them in order to hide it from us... perhaps."
"That's... you're overthinking it, Chisato."
"...Then how about you, Tamako?@k@vS04/37/310300642. Is there any solid evidence or something that disproves it?!"
"Chisato, you..."
"I can't believe it either... I don't want to believe it!@k@|@y@vS04/37/310300644. However!@k@vS04/37/310300645. It would explain all of Natsumi's abnormal behavior!!"
*Shudder*
Chisato said that and wrapped her arms around herself and trembled, hanging her head with a grimace of revulsion.
Whether it was because she thought her friend had the blood of lunatics running through her, or because she hated herself for suspecting her friend might be something like that... Akira didn't know.
"Did you... ask her?"
"There's no way I could do that!@k@vS04/37/310300647. Even if she tells me no, I don't know if I can believe her,@k@vS04/37/310300648. and if she says yes, then I..."
Akira understood Chisato's frustration and indecision very well.
No one would want to believe their friend was a lunatic. ...But at the same time, no one wants their friend to be a liar.
Facts and fiction. When forced to accept one or the other... which would bring less pain and suffering?
Nevertheless...
"If Kimiyoshi is what you say.@k@vS04/39/310200127. ...Chisato, Tama, will you stop being her friends?"
After sighing heavily, Chisato and Tamako looked up at Akira. Then after choosing his words, Akira breathed in and spoke quietly.
"Regardless of where she was born, Natsumi Kimiyoshi is Natsumi Kimiyoshi.@k@vS04/39/310200129. I... believe in Kimiyoshi."
"Akira..."

"Didn't you say it, Chisato?@k@vS04/39/310200131. Thanks to the shock of the incident, Kimiyoshi's mind is unstable.@k@vS04/39/310200132. So, the best thing for us to do is to wait and watch over her until she recovers.@k@vS04/39/310200133. ...Don't you agree?"
"......Akira-chan."

"I... I like Kimiyoshi.@k@vS04/39/310200135. She might be hurt now and going through a rough time,@k@vS04/39/310200136. ...but I believe she'll be back to her old self some day.@k@vS04/39/310200137. We have to believe it. Don't you see how much Kimiyoshi is suffering?"
Listening to Akira's well thought out words, the two of them turned their gaze downward.
...But Chisato quickly raised her head as though in agreement and shook off the feeling. Then she turned to Akira with a smile on her face.

"...Hoo boy, isn't this a pickle.@k@vS04/37/310300653. Even though we tried to be the ones who understood Natsumi best, Akira's the one who really stole the show here~.@k@|@y@vS04/37/310300654. This is the biggest defeat of Chii-chan's life, tahaha!"
"Chisato..."
"You're right.@k@vS04/38/310400242. That's right, we have to pull ourselves together!@k@|@y@vS04/38/310400243. After all, Natsumi's the one suffering the most."
Tamako said that, clapped her hands, and gave a refreshing smile. She turned back to Akira, looking at him with a hint of mischief.
"I must say, you really are earnest, Akira-chan,@k@vS04/38/310400245. I didn't realize you two had such a strong bond~."
"Right, right!@k@vS04/37/310300656. You should be saying all those cool things to her, moron!"
"Ow?!@k@vS04/39/310200140. What are you doing, Chisato!?"
"Aahahhahhah!@k@vS04/37/310300658. Well then, Sunday's all yours!@k@vS04/37/310300659. Work hard for Natsumi's sake, ok~?"
"See ya, Akira-chan.@k@vS04/38/310400247. Good luck with Natsumi~."
After saying that, the two of them headed back to the classroom in high spirits. Akira saw them off, and caught himself looking up at the sunset sky.
"...That's right.@k@vS04/39/310200142. Kimiyoshi is... Kimiyoshi."
......When those two first introduced him to her... He thought she was a girl who reminded him of the autumn cherry blossoms.
Like a rose, vivid but not garish.
Like a sunflower, lively but not showy.
Just simple... A fleeting beauty who appeared susceptible to a stiff breeze.
He liked her innocently smiling face.
He loved her sincerity that brought tears to her eyes when she looked at his drawings, and declared them fantastic.
She was probably more gentle than any girl he had ever met. It felt like she had a warm heart.
That's why... he was nervous.
Even though he said encouraging things to Chisato... Akira was also very scared.
If something caused her to lose that kindness and innocence.
And if they were to never return again.
What... would he do? No, what should he do?
Should he wait? Should he move on? Or...
"......Natsumi."
He gently muttered that name.
He wished to someday call her by that name when he conveyed his feelings to her. ...That alone brought a memory of Natsumi's smile into his mind, warming his heart.
If possible, he'd like to see it all the time. ...He wanted to get it back. And if he was capable of that...
In the evening sky, the voice of the higurashi could be heard echoing.
The vividly colored scenery was beautiful, and Akira kept staring at the clouds flowing in the sky as they faded into a deep vermillion hue.
